capabilities.need: word duration / syllable weight / how long a word occupies the voice
capabilities.canonical: CmuPhonemeEngine (codex/core/phonology/cmu.phoneme.engine.js) reads this file; align_lyrics.py _span_weight reads it directly
capabilities.coverage: 95-99% of lyric words; fall back to letter count, the next best proxy measured
capabilities.evidence: phoneme-weighted interpolation cut mean placement error 46-63% on 12-word runs across three tracks vs equal shares; beat character-length at nearly every run length; vowel-nuclei (plain syllable count) was worst of the three
forbidden: hand-rolling a vowel-group syllable counter — 'strength' is 1 syllable and 7 phonemes
melismaBonus as a model of sung stretch: it matches /([aeiou])\1{2,}/ in the SPELLING and returned 0 for all 577 words of a real lyric
spreading interpolated words evenly across a gap — 'I' and 'unfathomably' do not take the same time
graphemic vowel-group heuristics outside a documented pre-init fallback

capabilities.need: grapheme-to-phoneme for words absent from cmudict

capabilities.canonical: align_lyrics.py (MMS_FA + demucs) — produces alignment-v1 artifacts the frontend consumes
capabilities.evidence: NOTE: scripts/align-track.mts is a SECOND, WhisperX-based aligner producing a different sidecar format. Which one wins has never been decided; align_lyrics.py is the one wired to public/data/alignment and the visualiser.

capabilities.need: is a declared bpm real, or a DEFAULT_PACING placeholder?
capabilities.canonical: scan_bpm.py — Rayleigh lock of confident word onsets against a 16th grid, judged against a shuffled-gap noise ceiling
capabilities.evidence: caught a fabricated bpm 120 on Sonic Thaumaturgy (audio says 90.00, later confirmed); bpm seeds computeFingerprint, so a wrong tempo renders the wrong visual silently
forbidden: writing a bpm with no stated provenance
